fields.helpText: This is the sub-file of the LAB DATA (#63) file which contains  the record to which the image is temporarily associated.
This is the main LAB record with which the image is temporarily associated.

This is the IEN of the record in the sub-file identified by the SUBFILE NUMBER (#.01) field to which the image is temporarily associated. The main LAB record is identified by the LAB LRDFN (#2) field.

The image is usually the group-parent of the group of images that is linked to the entity in the temporary file.   (When the image group consists of one single image, that image won't have a "group parent", and this field will be the image itself.)
